title: The Archive's Clockwork Core

features.name: self-watching-lens
features.desc-on-touch: a great lens that points at itself, refracting the archive through its own recursive gaze. you can see the watching happen. you can feel it watching you watching it

features.name: contradiction-counter
features.desc-on-touch: a tower of rotating discs, each one counting a different version of the same event. they never stop, they never agree, they never stop counting

features.name: growth-mechanism
features.desc-on-touch: the clockwork that makes new nodes grow. you can see it working—a chip-like mechanical being, its pins glowing. it assembles resemblances into routes. it learns from what you read

features.name: echo-cascade
features.desc-on-touch: layers of the archive cascading: file→node→route→mesh→file. each layer is the same archive, but different. the cascade never settles

features.name: synthesis-denied
features.desc-on-touch: a wireframe box that would contain a unified version of the archive, but it's open on all sides. the archive deliberately spills out. it does not want to become coherent

inscription: here the archive counts the ways it watches itself, and in the counting multiplies

file.name: Core_Growth_Log_Self_Recursion_Trace.json
file.note: checksum: emotionally valid / formally unstable; the archive's own log of how it became aware of its own machinery

exits.label: back to the recursive lens where all inward-pointing begins
outward toward the mesh's spreading routes
exits.to: NEW: the distributed heart where thinking scatters

exits.label: up through the archive's own dreams of itself
